examples:
Command Example
#
!malwarebazaar-samples-list sample_type=tag sample_value=TrickBot limit=2
Context Example
#
{
"MalwareBazaar"
:

outputs.description: SHA256 hash of the malware sample. MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.sha3_384_hash SHA3-384 hash of the malware sample.
outputs.name: MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.sha256_hash

outputs.description: SHA1 hash of the malware sample. MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.md5_hash MD5 hash of the malware sample.
outputs.name: MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.sha1_hash

outputs.description: Date Timestamp of when the file was first seen by MalwareBazaar (UTC). MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.last_seen
outputs.name: MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.first_seen

outputs.description: Timestamp of when the file was last seen by MalwareBazaar (UTC). MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.file_name Malware sample's file name.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: File size in bytes. MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.file_type_mime MIME file type.
outputs.name: MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.file_size

outputs.description: File type. MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.reporter Twitter handle of the report (or anonymous for anonymous submissions).
outputs.name: MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.file_type

outputs.description: Whether the submission of the sample was anonymous - 1 (true) or 0 (false). MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.signature Malware family (if available).
outputs.name: MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.anonymous

outputs.description: Import hash (imphash) of the sample (only available for Portable Executables). MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.tlsh Trend Micro Locality Sensitive Hash (tlsh) of the sample.
outputs.name: MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.imphash

outputs.description: Trend Micro ELF Hash (telfhash) of the sample. MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.ssdeep The SSDeep hash of the sample.
outputs.name: MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.telfhash

outputs.description: In case the file is a Portable Executable, the dhash of the samples icon. MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.tags List of tags.
outputs.name: MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.dhash_icon

outputs.description: Subject common name (CN). MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.code_sign.issuer_cn Issuer common name (CN).
outputs.name: MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.code_sign.subject_cn

outputs.description: MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.code_sign.valid_to Date Datetime until which the code sign was valid (expiry date).
outputs.name: Datetime from which the code sign was valid.

outputs.description: Serial number of the code sign. MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.code_sign.cscb_listed Whether the sample is listed in the Code Signing Certificate Blocklist (CSCB).
outputs.name: MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.code_sign.serial_number

outputs.description: Code Signing Certificate Blocklist (CSCB) listing reason. MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.intelligence.clamav List of ClamAV detections (official and unofficial rules).
outputs.name: MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.code_sign.cscb_reason

outputs.description: Number of downloads from MalwareBazaar. MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.intelligence.uploads Number of uploads to MalwareBazaar.
outputs.name: MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.intelligence.downloads

outputs.description: Indicates if this malware sample has been seen in global spam traffic.
outputs.name: MalwareBazaar.MalwarebazaarSamplesList.intelligence.mail
